---

## 🚀 Overview

A modern, responsive portfolio site for Asiri Dhananjaya, Full Stack Developer & AI Specialist.  
Showcases projects, skills, and contact info with a focus on performance, accessibility, and modern web standards.

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

---

## ✨ Features

- **Responsive Design** – Mobile-first, adaptive layouts with Tailwind CSS
- **Dark/Light Theme Toggle** – User-selectable, system-aware theming
- **Sectioned Layout** – Hero, About, Projects, Contact (and Blog if enabled)
- **Project & Skills Showcase** – Dynamic display from TypeScript data files
- **Contact Section** – Collaboration, digital presence, and contact form
- **SEO & Social Meta** – Optimized meta tags and Open Graph/Twitter cards
- **Google Analytics** – Integrated with GA4 for traffic and event tracking
- **Performance Insights** – Vercel Speed Insights for real-user monitoring
- **Reusable UI Components** – Cards, buttons, badges, popovers, and more
- **Optimized Images** – Custom image component for performance
- **Toast Notifications** – Custom hook and UI for user feedback
- **Easy Theming** – Theme provider for consistent dark/light mode

---

## 🗂️ Project Structure

```text
src/
  components/
    layout/         # Navbar, Footer, SideNav, etc.
    sections/       # HeroSection, AboutSection, ProjectsSection, ContactSection, BlogSection
    ui/             # Reusable UI elements (Button, Card, Form, etc.)
  data/             # Content for sections (about, projects, skills, contact, etc.)
  hooks/            # Custom React hooks (e.g., use-toast)
  lib/              # Utilities and analytics
  providers/        # Theme provider, etc.
public/             # Static assets (images, favicon, resume, etc.)
index.html          # Main HTML entry with SEO and social meta tags
```

---

## ⚙️ Getting Started

```bash
git clone https://github.com/black-randy/Asiri.D.git
cd Asiri.D
npm install
npm run dev
```
Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) to view the site.

---

## 🧩 Customization

- **Content**: Edit files in `src/data/` to update bio, projects, skills, and contact info.
- **Images**: Replace images in `public/` as needed (avatar, banners, project screenshots).
- **Theme**: Adjust Tailwind config or theme provider for custom colors and fonts.

---

## 🧪 Development & Standards

- Follows [general coding standards](.github/instructions/general-coding.instructions.md)
- Lint: `npm run lint`
- Format: `npm run format`
- Pull requests welcome!
